answer_en:
Adductor Pollicis m.
Origin: Body of 3rd metacarpal (transverse head); capitate, and bases of 2nd and 3rd metacarpals (oblique head)
Insertion: Base of proximal phalanx of thumb (1st digit)

details: Origin: Body of 3rd metacarpal (transverse head); capitate, and bases of 2nd and 3rd metacarpals (oblique head)
